a:r.a:t: Plan component complexity – Marketing (40 plan variations)
42 legacy job titles mapped into 11 consolidated roles, with the clearest reuse in local marketing frontline plans.
Role mapping summary | Consolidated Roles List
Plan family summary | Consolidated Comp Plans
Largest role roll-up: Marketing Manager consolidates 13 legacy titles.
• Most reused family: LM frontline / agent plans cover 6 roles around tour, sales transaction, and FPS package measures.
• Residual complexity: the cohort still carries 9 distinct measure-and-cadence blueprints after the role roll-up.
Blueprints = unique measure + cadence signatures; plan families are grouped for readability, and comp-plan role counts can be more granular than the roles tab.
